homepage.title: Startseite - TiroTool Diamant Werkzeug Systeme GmbH
homepage.text_excerpt:
Startseite - TiroTool Diamant Werkzeug Systeme GmbH
TIROTOOL ist auf der Intertool 2026!
Sie finden uns auf Stand
21-0717
, gemeinsam mit unserem Mitaussteller
Böhlerit GmbH & Co. KG.
Wir freuen uns auf euren Besuch!
Präzisionswerkzeuge aus ultraharten Schneidstoffen, PKD, CBN und CVD
Ihr bevorzugter Partner für die Zerspanung mit Präzisionswerkzeugen aus ultraharten Schneidstoffen, PKD, CBN und CVD. Wir lösen mit dem wirtschaftlichsten Werkzeugkonzept die Bearbeitungsaufgaben und senken dabei Ihre Gesamtprozesskosten.
Unsere Zerspanungslösungen konzentrieren sich ausschließlich auf die Verwendung von ultraharten Schneidstoffen und sind auf höchste Qualität und Ökonomie ausgerichtet. Ihre Anforderungen und die daraus resultierende Zielstellung stehen dabei immer im Fokus.
Dabei setzen wir auf individuelle Kundenberatung um eine optimale Wirtschaftlichkeit im Einsatz unserer Produkte, bestehend aus Standard und Sonderlösungen, in Ihrer Fertigungslandschaft zu erreichen. Profitieren auch Sie von der jahrzehntelangen Erfahrung unserer Spezialisten in der Auslegung und Optimierung von Zerspanungsprozessen.
Branchen
Werkzeug und Formenbau
Automobilindustrie
Medizintechnik
Feinmechanik
Luftfahrtsindustrie
Energiesektor
Kundenspezifische Sonderlösungen

about.text:
About us -
About us
History
TIROTOOL Diamond Tools works closely with partners and customers on developing and providing solutions to increase their productivity and competitiveness. Our employees and partners are represented worldwide and support you with our network in fulfilling your tasks and challenges. Together with our cooperative partners from the world of ultra-hard cutting materials we follow trends, detect challenges and develop solutions to meet tomorrow’s requirements in your industry.
TIROTOOL stands out as your reliable partner. We work on your challenges with trust, respect and high competence. Our solutions are more than just tools for milling, turning or bore machining. We work closely together with you as a team, considering and optimizing all aspects of your production. For more than 20 years, we as TiroTool have been developing tools from ultra-hard cutting materials in Tyrol, optimizing processes in individual as well as series production, which is why leading manufacturers choose us.
Our team is ready for you, for an efficient cooperation.
Precisely to success
TIROTOOL Diamond Tools has been specialized in precision tools made of ultra-hard cutting materials for more than 20 years. We are regionally rooted in Tyrol, but can state with good conscience that we are an international company. Our reputation as a specialist with profound knowledge is shared with our customers and long-term partners present in the “high-end machining”.
We love cookies!
We use our own and third-party cookies and external plugins. These help us to improve our website and to show you relevant, personalized content. We ask for your consent for these cookies and plugins. Further information can be found in the
Privacy policy
. Note: If you click on forms, Google reCAPTCHA will be loaded.
Settings
Accept all

products.text:
Products -
Products - Precise to success
TiroTool Werkzeugsysteme GmbH has been dealing with precision tools made of ultra-hard cutting materials for over 20 years. We are regionally deeply rooted in Tyrol, but we can say with a clear conscience that we are an international company. We share our reputation as a specialist with in-depth knowledge with our customers and long-standing partners in "high-end machining".
Milling tools
Whether mold making or mechanical engineering - with our milling tools you always get the job done. We carry all common tool types. Our milling tools are specialists for high-performance machining of everything from aluminum to sintered carbide.
Drilling and reaming tools
Highest performance and perfection at the same time: The application-specific special tools for drilling and reaming applications based on PCD leave nothing to be desired by the user. The drills guarantee high drilling performance thanks to a particularly stable structure. Outstanding wear and fracture resistance ensure no plastic deformation. All products are designed for high processing speeds on a wide variety of materials.
Information about our product examples can be found in the downloads.
The tools at a glance
Polycrystalline diamond PCD
PCD is a synthetically manufactured substrate made of diamond particles in a metallic binder phase. It is manufactured by high-pressure high-temperature synthesis or by high-pressure liquid-phase sintering. The hard, wear-resistant PCD cutting edges with around 90 percent diamond content and diamond grits between 0.8 and 15 µm, in mining up to 30 µm, have a very long service life when machining non-ferrous materials. The high cutting edge sharpness of at least the smallest grain size used, i.e. from 0.8 µm, is achieved by grinding, spark erosion or precision lasers. The metallic binder phase generates a certain toughness, which is an advantage in some applications. The main areas of application are aluminum alloys with more than 4 percent silicon, hard metal green compacts, titanium alloys and GRP and CFRP composite materials.
CVD thick film diamond
The synthetic CVD thick film diamond is created by chemically coating a carrier substance in a gas phase. CVD diamond is almost 99.9 percent pure diamond. As a cutting material, it is brazed onto carrier tools in layers between 0.2 and 1.2 mm. With CVD diamonds, consisting of rows of rod-shaped diamond crystals, the cutting edge works exactly in the direction of greatest hardness. This is why CVD diamond as a cutting material is harder than PCD and natural diamond. In addition, CVD diamond, like natural diamond and MKD, has the highest thermal conductivity of all cutting materials and, with a precision-lasered cutting edge, has a high cutting edge sharpness similar to MKD. The sharp cutting edges offer particular advantages when machining CFRP and GFRP composites, cemented carbide green compacts, ready-sintered cemented carbide, ceramics and wrought aluminum alloys wit
